text:
Javietti (ハピエッチ, Hapietchi) Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 389 is one of Queen Duazul's personal soldiers that's assigned to Prince Luzurus Hui Guo Rou. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 386 

Appearance

Javietti has fair neatly combed hair, beady eyes, sharp cheekbones, and an upturned nose. As a Royal Bodyguard, he wears a black suit and a tie. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Amid the incident involving Shikaku's suicide, Javietti armed with his weapon approaches a disconcerted Rice and demands to know what happened. Rice answers that Shikaku simply shot himself in the head. Javietti and the other royal bodyguards then examine the premises where the suicide took place. 

In Kanjidol's cogitation of Shikaku's suicide, he concludes that it was a diversionary plot concocted by Prince Halkenburg using his mother's personal soldiers to take advantage of the ensuing turmoil. At the time of the suicide, Javietti and Rice were on guard duty in the living room.
